title: Front Office Manager - Wyndham India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Wyndham India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wyndham India! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wyndham India:
Wyndham India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wyndham India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
